description: Style NoteOffering lightweight comfort and packed with features, the adidas J-Run III makes for a fabulous running shoe, offering breathable comfort and abrasion resistance mile after mile. For those who love to flaunt a sporty style, this shoe also makes for a great casual wear.Product DetailsSynthetic upper for enhanced breathablity and lightweight comfortSynthetic leather overlays with Adidas patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot region for enhanced shoe structureMeshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfortCentral lacing system for a snug, customised FitReinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back footReinforced overlay over toe box for durability and added protection to the forefootRecycled mesh lining for instep comfortPadded and removable sockliner for all-day comfort and shock absorptionEVA midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionTPR outsole with herringbone patterned grooves for absolute grip and tractionMaterial and CareSyntheticUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not store in direct sunlight
